_doc: Cached Figma frame tree used by the QA Annotator extension to auto-fill
Figma deeplinks for picked elements via nearest-ancestor matching.
Generated by /qa:figma-sync. Re-run when the Figma file structure changes.
Sibling file: qa-profile.json (pages[], sections[] reference nodeIds defined here).
Schema:
pages           list of pages crawled, each with viewport variants.
pages[].viewports[].rootNodeId  the top-of-page Figma node for that viewport.
pages[].viewports[].sections    direct children that look like page sections.
nodes           flat lookup. Key = nodeId ("1234:5678" — colon form, matches Figma API).
nodes[id].name  Figma layer name (e.g. "Frame 45", "Hero").
nodes[id].type  FRAME | SECTION | COMPONENT | INSTANCE | GROUP | TEXT.
nodes[id].parentId  immediate parent in the tree, or null for page roots.
nodes[id].depth     0 for page root, 1 for section, etc.
nodes[id].bbox      { x, y, w, h } in Figma absolute coords.
nodes[id].viewport  which viewport this node belongs to (desktop|tablet|mobile|...)
nodes[id].text      string, only for TEXT nodes (truncated to 240 chars).
nodes[id].summary   FRAME/INSTANCE/GROUP only — concat of descendant TEXT (200 chars).
Lets the matcher show 'Frame 45 (• <heading text>…)' instead of
a meaningless 'Frame 45'. Compressed in storage as key `s`.
nodes[id].pageName  back-reference for fast page lookup.
nodes[id].breadcrumb  human-readable ancestor chain for tooltips.
sectionIndex    per-section hints harvested from src/components/sections/*.
sectionIndex[name].file              source path
sectionIndex[name].figmaNodeId       primary Figma node (from `// figma:` or data-figma-node-id)
sectionIndex[name].figmaInnerNodeIds additional `// figma:` annotations inside the file
sectionIndex[name].texts[]           static text strings extracted from h1/h2/h3/p elements
sectionIndex[name].source            data-attr | comment | both | texts-only | none
